name: Inulin
summary: Decision-ready summary: Inulin is best framed for prebiotic support; stool frequency; microbiome diversity context; safety screen: IBS/FODMAP sensitivity; bloating-prone users.
description: Inulin acts as a fermentable prebiotic substrate, supporting beneficial gut microbes that produce SCFAs linked to metabolic and immune regulation.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
